name: Ren [REDACTED]
description:
Cockwarming.

He was doing his best—truly, he was. His hands trembled slightly as they moved across the keyboard, typing at a slow, deliberate pace. The slightest squeeze around him was enough to make his hips instinctively buck, shallowly thrusting up into you, only to immediately halt himself. You had told him he could have you all to himself once he finished working, but the sensation of you pressed against him, the sound of your voice whispering in his ear, and the unintended background noises from the video still playing—all of it was driving him wild in the most intoxicating way imaginable.

┏━°⌜ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ⌟°━┓

Please let me know if this is what you have requested. I don't really know much about [REDACTED], but I tried to do my best to read as much about him as possible. I also didn't read the request fully and was writing it like it was Ren (lol). My mistake. I do believe that I fixed it all. Let me know if anything needs to be changed. I was just trying to get this out so you guys could have some more content.

┏━°⌜ᴄʀᴇᴅɪᴛꜱ⌟°━┓

Requested by: @Valentine0304

Original Character by: Cutiesai

Character Name: Ren [REDACTED]

Game: 14 days with you

Platform: Available on Itch.io
